prestazioni: Engine swap to a **CA18DET** (230+ hp potential) with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbocharger, **HKS 264° camshafts**, and **Tomei 4-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold** for optimized spool and top-end power. Pair with a **Nismo 555cc fuel injector set** and **Walbro 255 LPH fuel pump** to support E85 blends.

Full **Nismo Type-A** suspension overhaul: **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs) with **Nismo front strut tower bar** and **Cusco 22mm rear sway bar** for chassis rigidity. **Nismo 4-piston front brake calipers** with **Project Mu 970 brake pads** and **DBA 5000 Series rotors** for fade-resistant stopping power.

ECU reflash via **Haltech Elite 1500** standalone unit with **Nissan Consult-II datalogging** integration. Custom **MAP-based boost control** (22 psi peak) with **HKS EVC-S boost controller**, **GReddy intercooler core (400x200x60mm)** and **Samco silicone charge pipes** to eliminate heat soak on the **CA18DET’s** stock intercooler location.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1** widebody kit (U12-specific) with **custom 3M Matte Gunmetal wrap** and **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** (carbon fiber, 1200mm span) for downforce. **Work Meister S1 3P 16x9 +35** wheels (gunmetal finish) with **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R 225/45/16 tires** for grip.

**Nismo S-Tune** front bumper lip (U12-specific) with **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (vented, 3kg weight reduction). **GReddy RS cat-back exhaust** (dual 3.5" outlets) with **custom rolled rear fenders** to clear **245/40/16 tires** on the rear Work wheels.

**Recaro SRD** (JDM-spec) seats with **Takata Drift II harnesses** and **Nismo SSS-specific shift knob** (CA18DET gearbox). **Defi BF Advance** gauges (boost, oil temp, AFR) mounted in a **custom A-pillar pod** (carbon fiber, 3D-printed bracket). **Osir LED headlight conversion** with **Morimoto HID projectors** for modernized lighting.
